title: Loxostigma begoniifolium
taxonomy: Loxostigma begoniifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Loxostigma, which consists of about 25 species of plants. Loxostigma begoniifolium is native to China and is often found in forests and woodland areas. The plant is characterized by its distinctive begonia-like leaves and produces small, white or pink flowers. The exact classification of Loxostigma begoniifolium is within the family Gesneriaceae and order Lamiales.
